name: Garnachas
ingredients: Tortilla, ground beef, cabbage, tomato sauce, cheese
description: Small, thick fried tortillas topped with savory minced meat, curtido (cabbage salad), and a rich tomato sauce.

name: Rellenitos de Plátano
description: Mashed sweet plantains stuffed with sweetened black beans, fried to golden perfection, and dusted with sugar.

name: Chuchitos
ingredients: Corn masa, pork or chicken, recado (tomato sauce)
description: Small, firm tamales wrapped in corn husks, filled with meat and a traditional tomato-based recado.

name: Tostadas con Guacamol
ingredients: Crispy tortilla, avocado, onion, oregano, cheese
description: A crisp, fried tortilla spread with freshly mashed avocado, topped with sliced onions and dry cheese.

name: Elotes Locos
ingredients: Corn on the cob, mayonnaise, ketchup, mustard, cheese
description: Cooked sweet corn on a stick, slathered in mayonnaise, ketchup, mustard, and rolled in dry cheese.

name: Atol de Elote
description: A warm, comforting, and thick beverage made from blended sweet corn, spiced with cinnamon.

name: Dobladas
description: Crispy folded tortillas stuffed with a mixture of potatoes, cheese, or meat, typically topped with tomato sauce and cabbage.

name: Empanadas de Manjar
ingredients: Flour dough, milk, cornstarch, sugar, vanilla
description: Baked or fried pastries filled with a sweet, creamy vanilla custard (manjar) and sprinkled with colored sugar.

name: Shucos
description: The traditional Guatemalan hot dog, featuring toasted bread, guacamole, boiled cabbage, and various grilled meats.

name: Tamales de Chipilín
description: Simple but flavorful tamales made by mixing corn dough with the leaves of the native chipilín plant.

name: Molletes
ingredients: Sweet bread, manjar, eggs, panela syrup
description: Sweet bread stuffed with custard, dipped in egg batter, fried, and served swimming in a warm syrup made from panela.

name: Tostadas con Salsa
ingredients: Crispy tortilla, tomato sauce, cheese, parsley
description: A classic snack featuring a crisp tortilla smothered in traditional red tomato sauce and sprinkled with cheese.

name: Arroz en Leche
description: A soothing, warm rice pudding drink steeped with cinnamon sticks, perfect for chilly evenings.

name: Enchiladas Guatemaltecas
ingredients: Tostada, lettuce, beet salad, ground meat, egg
description: A visually striking dish: a tostada piled high with lettuce, a vibrant beet and vegetable mix, ground meat, and a slice of hard-boiled egg.

name: Tostadas con Frijol
ingredients: Crispy tortilla, black beans, cheese, onion
description: A simple, beloved staple consisting of a fried tortilla spread with pureed black beans and topped with dry cheese.
